completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] New module `forge.pipeline.mode_chains_data` (or extend `stage_taxonomy.py`) exports the required public symbols.
completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/mode_chains_data.py with __all__ listing MODE_A_CHAIN, MODE_B_CHAIN, MODE_C_CHAIN, MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES, MODE_C_FORBIDDEN_STAGES, CHAIN_BY_MODE, MODE_B_PREREQUISITES, MODE_C_PREREQUISITES. TestModuleStructure (3 tests) validates module path, exported symbols and the import-cycle-free invariant.

MODE_B_CHAIN defined as the four-tuple in mode_chains_data.py. TestModeBChain (5 tests) covers exact sequence, strict-suffix-of-Mode-A relationship, exclusion of pre-feature-spec stages, tuple type, and StageClass-typed members.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `MODE_C_CHAIN: tuple[StageClass, ...]` = (TASK_REVIEW, TASK_WORK, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW) with documentation noting TASK_WORK repeats per fix task and PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW is conditional on commits
completion_promises.evidence: MODE_C_CHAIN defined as the three-tuple (TASK_REVIEW, TASK_WORK, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW) with a multi-paragraph docstring explaining the per-fix-task fan-out of TASK_WORK is delegated to the cycle controller (TASK-MBC8-004) and that PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW is conditional on commits per ASSUM-005 / ASSUM-017. TestModeCChain (6 tests) pins exact sequence, length-3, type, entry stage and terminator.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES: frozenset[StageClass]` containing PRODUCT_OWNER, ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN
completion_promises.evidence: MODE_B_FORBIDDEN_STAGES defined as a frozenset of exactly those four stages. TestModeBForbiddenStages (3 tests) validates frozenset type, exact membership, and disjointness from MODE_B_CHAIN.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `MODE_C_FORBIDDEN_STAGES: frozenset[StageClass]` containing every Mode A pre-feature-spec stage plus FEATURE_SPEC, FEATURE_PLAN, AUTOBUILD (Mode C operates on existing artefacts)
completion_promises.evidence: MODE_C_FORBIDDEN_STAGES is the seven-element frozenset {PRODUCT_OWNER, ARCHITECT, SYSTEM_ARCH, SYSTEM_DESIGN, FEATURE_SPEC, FEATURE_PLAN, AUTOBUILD}. TestModeCForbiddenStages (4 tests) validates frozenset type, exact membership, that PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW is NOT forbidden (per ASSUM-005), and disjointness from MODE_C_CHAIN.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `CHAIN_BY_MODE: Mapping[BuildMode, tuple[StageClass, ...]]` mapping each BuildMode value to its chain (Mode A continues to use the existing 8-stage chain)
completion_promises.evidence: CHAIN_BY_MODE typed as Mapping[BuildMode, tuple[StageClass, ...]] with all three BuildMode keys present. MODE_A_CHAIN re-exported as the canonical eight-stage Mode A chain. TestChainByMode (5 tests, parametrised over all three modes) validates exhaustive coverage and the Mode A chain identity.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `MODE_B_PREREQUISITES`: same shape as `STAGE_PREREQUISITES` but only for Mode B's four stages
completion_promises.evidence: MODE_B_PREREQUISITES is a dict[StageClass, list[StageClass]] with three rows: FEATURE_PLAN←FEATURE_SPEC, AUTOBUILD←FEATURE_PLAN, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW←AUTOBUILD. FEATURE_SPEC is the entry stage and is omitted (mirroring how PRODUCT_OWNER is omitted from STAGE_PREREQUISITES). TestModeBPrerequisites (8 tests) validates dict type, three entries, entry-stage omission, parametrised row matching, and key/value typing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `MODE_C_PREREQUISITES`: same shape but for Mode C's three stage classes (`TASK_WORK ← TASK_REVIEW`, `PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW ← TASK_WORK`)
completion_promises.evidence: MODE_C_PREREQUISITES is a dict[StageClass, list[StageClass]] with the two rows verbatim from the AC: TASK_WORK←TASK_REVIEW, PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW←TASK_WORK. TASK_REVIEW (the entry stage) is omitted. TestModeCPrerequisites (7 tests) validates dict type, two entries, entry-stage omission, parametrised row matching, and key/value typing.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Module docstring references FEAT-FORGE-008 ASSUM-001 (Mode B chain), ASSUM-004 (Mode C chain), ASSUM-013 (mode-aware planning refuses upstream Mode A stages), ASSUM-014 (Mode B does not dispatch to specialists)
completion_promises.evidence: Module docstring of forge.pipeline.mode_chains_data explicitly references FEAT-FORGE-008, ASSUM-001, ASSUM-004, ASSUM-013, ASSUM-014 (and supporting ASSUM-005, ASSUM-011, ASSUM-017 plus ADR-ARCH-026). TestModuleDocstring is parametrised over each required anchor (FEAT-FORGE-008, ASSUM-001, ASSUM-004, ASSUM-013, ASSUM-014) and asserts presence in the docstring.
